steps.title: Recognize the pattern
steps.content: The first study established a correlation: behavioral similarities correspond to genetic similarities (especially for chasing). The second study documents behavioral similarity in chasing between French bulldogs and bullmastiffs.

steps.title: Complete the logic
steps.content:
If behavioral similarity indicates genetic similarity, then observing chasing similarity between these breeds points to genetic similarity.

Choice A applies this logic directly. Choices B, C, and D address intensity levels, cross-breed comparisons, or future changes—none follow from the genetic-behavioral correlation.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
